document: Local Cycling and Walking Infrastructure Plans technical guidance
applicability: English local authorities preparing or updating a Local Cycling and Walking Infrastructure Plan under the currently published DfT method.

requirements.description: Define the plan scope, governance, stakeholders and intended use.
Compile information on existing conditions, travel patterns and barriers.
Develop the cycling network using the applicable DfT method.
Develop Core Walking Zones and key walking routes using the applicable DfT method.
Create a prioritised programme of walking and cycling improvements.
Integrate the plan with relevant local policy, strategies and delivery plans.
Record proportionate stakeholder and public engagement.
A council-selected local requirement that remains explicit and versioned.
